cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out the answer to this question based on the provided passage. Let me read through the passage again carefully to make sure I understand what it's saying about the World Bank study from 1974. The question is asking, according to the World Bank study in 1974, what was the outcome of economic growth in some backward countries. The options are (A) benefit to a third, (B) benefit to two thirds, (C) little benefit, (D) no benefit. Wait, that wording is a bit confusing. Let me parse it again. The sentence says that decades of rapid growth "has been of little benefit to a third of their population."
